---
title: "ExploratoryDA"
format: html
editor: visual
---

The `echo: false` option disables the printing of code (only output is displayed).

```{r}
install.packages("tidyverse")
library(tidyverse)
```

# Reading The Dataset:

```{r}
Stock_Market_Dataset <- read_csv("Stock_Market_Dataset.csv")
View(Stock_Market_Dataset)

```

```{r}

Stock_Market_Dataset
summary(Stock_Market_Dataset)

```

## Data Visualization:

```{r}
colnames(Stock_Market_Dataset)
#The columns seem to be syntax correct for R
```

```{r}
#basic Variation of bitcoin price
Stock_Market_Dataset %>% ggplot(aes(Bitcoin_Price)) +
  geom_histogram()
#counts are regular and there does not appear to be outliers initially
#Somewhat even distribution
#Why are majority of the values around 10,000?

```

```{r}
#basic variation of bitcoin volume
Stock_Market_Dataset %>% ggplot(aes(Bitcoin_Vol.)) +
  geom_histogram()

#odd looking results, there could be some anomalies.
#normalization can bring better results here. 


```

```{r}
#Basic Variation with Ethereum Stock prices
Stock_Market_Dataset %>% ggplot(aes(Ethereum_Price)) +
  geom_histogram()
#regular distribution
#more values are around 0-500 and 1500-2000 why?
#what dates do these correspond to?
```

```{r}

#Calculate the mean volume of the crypto currencies and compare
Stock_Market_Dataset$Date <- as.Date(Stock_Market_Dataset$Date, format = ("%d-%m-%Y"))
```

```{r}
#covariation of bitcoin volume and bitcoin price
Stock_Market_Dataset %>%
  ggplot(aes(log(Bitcoin_Vol.), Bitcoin_Price, color = Date)) +
  geom_point()+
  labs(title = "Bitcoin price vs Volume over time")

```

```{r}
Stock_Market_Dataset %>% ggplot(aes(x=Date, y=Ethereum_Price)) +
  geom_line()

```

```{r}
Stock_Market_Dataset %>% ggplot(aes(x=Date, y=Bitcoin_Price)) +
  geom_line()
  
```

```{r}
#mean of the volume

crypto <- Stock_Market_Dataset %>% select(Date, 
                                          Bitcoin_Price,
                                          Bitcoin_Vol.,
                                          Ethereum_Price,
                                          Ethereum_Vol.)
crypto

```

```{r}
```

```{r}
crypto %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = Date)) + 
  geom_line(aes(y = Bitcoin_Price, color = "Bitcoin")) + 
  geom_line(aes(y = Ethereum_Price, color = "Ethereum")) + 
  labs(x = "Date", 
       y = "Price (USD)", 
       color = "Cryptocurrency")

```

```{r}
#get the mean crypto volumes
crypto %>% ggplot() +
  geom_col(aes(x = 'bitcoin_mean', y= mean(Bitcoin_Vol.), color = 'bit_vol_mean')) +
  geom_col(aes(x = 'ethereum_mean', y= mean(Ethereum_Vol.), color = 'Ethereum_vol_mean')) +
  labs(x= 'Currencies', 
       y= 'Mean Trading Volumes')
```

```{r}

#mean, median, stdDeviation of price and volume
#volume over time/requires normalization

crypto %>% ggplot(aes(Date, log(Bitcoin_Vol.))) +
  geom_line()

```

```{r}


#before normalization 
crypto %>% ggplot(aes(Date, Bitcoin_Vol.)) +
  geom_line()

```

```{r}


crypto %>% ggplot(aes(x= Date)) +
  geom_line(aes(y = log(Bitcoin_Price), color = "Price")) +
  geom_line(aes(y = log(Bitcoin_Vol.), color = "Volume")) +
  labs(title = "Bitcoin Price vs Volume",
       y= "Normalized Scale")


```

```{r}
# can we check the distribution over the months 
crypto %>% ggplot(aes(log(Bitcoin_Vol.))) +
  geom_histogram()


```

## Outlier Handling:

```{r}
#Determine what values are 3 sd from the mean for crypto price/vol
bit_mean_vol = mean(crypto$Bitcoin_Vol., na.rm = TRUE)
bit_median_vol = median(crypto$Bitcoin_Vol., na.rm = TRUE)
bit_std_vol = sd(crypto$Bitcoin_Vol., na.rm = TRUE)

bit_mean_price = mean(crypto$Bitcoin_Price, na.rm = TRUE)
bit_median_price = median(crypto$Bitcoin_Price, na.rm = TRUE)
bit_std_price = sd(crypto$Bitcoin_Price, na.rm = TRUE)


#Outliers above and below the bitcoin volume, 12 Values
outlier_vol_bit <- crypto %>%
  filter(abs(Bitcoin_Vol. - bit_mean_vol) > 3 * bit_std_vol) %>%
  select(Bitcoin_Vol.) %>% 
  mutate(Bitcoin_Vol.= log(Bitcoin_Vol.))

view(outlier_vol_bit)



# There are no values outside 3 sd from the mean in bitcoin prices.
outlier_price_bit <- crypto %>%
  filter(abs(Bitcoin_Price - bit_mean_price) > 3 * bit_std_price) %>%
  select(Bitcoin_Price) %>% 
  mutate(Bitcoin_Price= Bitcoin_Price)

view(outlier_price_bit)
#count the number of NA values in each column of the stock dataset
#focus on columns
```

```{r}
crypto %>% ggplot()+
  geom_histogram(aes(log(Bitcoin_Vol.)))+
  labs(title = "Bitcoin Volume Normalized")

crypto %>% ggplot()+
  geom_histogram(aes(log((Ethereum_Vol.))))+
  labs(title = "Ethereum Volume Normalized")

```

```{r}
outlier_vol_eth <- crypto %>% 
  filter(abs(Ethereum_Vol. - mean(Ethereum_Vol.)) > 3 * sd(Ethereum_Vol.)) %>%
  select(Ethereum_Vol.) %>% 
  mutate(Ethereum_Vol.= log(Ethereum_Vol.))
outlier_vol_eth
```

```{r}
remove_outliers <- function(df, col_name) {
  q1 <- quantile(df[[col_name]], 0.25, na.rm = TRUE)
  q3 <- quantile(df[[col_name]], 0.75, na.rm = TRUE)
  iqr <- q3 - q1
  lower <- q1 - 1.5 * iqr
  upper <- q3 + 1.5 * iqr
  df[df[[col_name]] >= lower & df[[col_name]] <= upper, ]
}

without_outliers <- remove_outliers(crypto, "Bitcoin_Vol.")

without_outliers %>% 
  ggplot(aes(Date))+
  geom_line(aes(y = log(Bitcoin_Price), color = "Price"))+
  geom_line(aes(y = log(Bitcoin_Vol.), color = "Volume"))
              
```

```{r}
#percentage and number of outliers within crypto columns
summary(crypto)
```

```{r}

#applying the log can increase the number of outliers when visualizing the dataset since the inter quartile range is smaller.
crypto %>%
  mutate(log_bit_vol = log(Bitcoin_Vol.)) %>% 
  ggplot()+
  geom_boxplot(mapping = aes(log_bit_vol))

crypto %>% 
  mutate(log_eth_vol = log(Ethereum_Vol.)) %>% 
  ggplot()+
  geom_boxplot(mapping = aes(log_eth_vol))


```

```{r}
#check the percent of outliers outside the IQR
percent_outliers <- function(df){
  q1 <- quantile(df, .025)
  q3 <- quantile(df, .75)
  #calc IQR
  iqr <- q3-q1
  lower <- q1 - 1.5*iqr
  upper <- q3 + 1.5*iqr
  mean(df < lower | df > upper) *100
}

Vars = c("Bitcoin_Price", "Bitcoin_Vol.", "Ethereum_Price", "Ethereum_Vol.")

crypto_iqr_outliers <- data.frame(
  Variables = Vars,
  outlier_percent = sapply(crypto[, Vars], percent_outliers)
)

crypto_iqr_outliers

```

```{r}
#We want to visualize the relationship with price and volume log normalized for each cyrpto variables

#first distributions

crypto %>% ggplot()+
  geom_point(aes(x=log(Bitcoin_Price), y=log(Bitcoin_Vol.), color = Date))+
  geom_smooth(aes(x=log(Bitcoin_Price), y=log(Bitcoin_Vol.)))+
  labs(title = "Bitcoin Price vs Volume")

crypto %>% ggplot(aes(x=log(Ethereum_Price), y=log(Ethereum_Vol.), color = Date))+
  geom_point()+
  geom_smooth()+
  labs(title = "Ethereum Price vs Volume")
```

## Data Transformations

```{r}

#Some additional visualizations on bitcoin and ethereum over time
crypto %>% ggplot(aes(x=Date))+
  geom_line(aes(y=log(Ethereum_Vol.), color = "Ethereum"))+
  geom_line(aes(y=log(Bitcoin_Vol.), color = "Bitcoin"))+
  labs(title = "Ethereum vs Bitcoin Volume over time")

crypto %>% ggplot(aes(x=Date))+
  geom_line(aes(y=log(Ethereum_Price), color = "Ethereum"))+
  geom_line(aes(y=log(Bitcoin_Price), color = "Bitcoin"))+
  labs(title = "Ethereum vs Bitcoin Volume over time")
  
```

```{r}

#Percentage and number of missing values within crypto columns
summary(is.na(crypto))
```

```{r}

install.packages("lubridate")
```

```{r}
library(lubridate)
```

```{r}


crypto_summary <- crypto %>%
  mutate(
    Year = year(Date),
    Month = month(Date, label = TRUE, abbr = TRUE)  # Jan, Feb, etc.
  ) %>%
  group_by(Month) %>%
  summarise(
    Max_Bitcoin = max(Bitcoin_Price, na.rm = TRUE),
    Min_Bitcoin = min(Bitcoin_Price, na.rm = TRUE),
    Max_Ethereum = max(Ethereum_Price, na.rm = TRUE),
    Min_Ethereum = min(Ethereum_Price, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = 'drop'
  )

view(crypto_summary)
```

```{r}
crypto <- crypto %>%
  mutate(
    Eth_Price_Level = ntile(Ethereum_Price, 3),  # 1 = low, 2 = medium, 3 = high
    Eth_Price_Level = case_when(
      Eth_Price_Level == 1 ~ "Low",
      Eth_Price_Level == 2 ~ "Medium",
      Eth_Price_Level == 3 ~ "High"
    )
  )

crypto <- crypto %>%
  mutate(
    Bit_Price_Level = ntile(Bitcoin_Price, 3),  # 1 = low, 2 = medium, 3 = high
    Bit_Price_Level = case_when(
      Bit_Price_Level == 1 ~ "Low",
      Bit_Price_Level == 2 ~ "Medium",
      Bit_Price_Level == 3 ~ "High"
    )
  )

view(crypto)
```

```{r}
summary(crypto)
```

```{r}
price_stats <- crypto %>%
  summarise(
    Mean_Eth = mean(Ethereum_Price, na.rm = TRUE),
    SD_Eth = sd(Ethereum_Price, na.rm = TRUE)
  )

crypto <- crypto %>%
  mutate(
    Eth_Classification = case_when(
      Ethereum_Price < (price_stats$Mean_Eth - price_stats$SD_Eth) ~ "Low",
      Ethereum_Price > (price_stats$Mean_Eth + price_stats$SD_Eth) ~ "High",
      TRUE ~ "Medium"
    )
  )

view(crypto)
```

```{r}
price_stats <- crypto %>%
  summarise(
    Mean_Bit = mean(Bitcoin_Price, na.rm = TRUE),
    SD_Bit = sd(Bitcoin_Price, na.rm = TRUE)
  )

#less than 1 SD ~LOW, Greater than 1 SD ~HIGH, Within ~Med
crypto <- crypto %>%
  mutate(
    Bit_Classification = case_when(
      Bitcoin_Price < (price_stats$Mean_Bit - price_stats$SD_Bit) ~ "Low",
      Bitcoin_Price > (price_stats$Mean_Bit + price_stats$SD_Bit) ~ "High",
      TRUE ~ "Medium"
    )
  )
view(crypto)
```

```{r}
crypto %>% ggplot()+
  geom_bar(aes(Bit_Classification))
```

```{r}
crypto %>% ggplot()+
  geom_bar(aes(Eth_Classification))
```

![]()

```{r}
#Count the number of Highs and Lows Per Month
crypto %>% arrange(Date)
#here we can tell not every day is recorded
```

```{r}
crypto <- crypto %>%
  arrange(Date) %>% 
  mutate(btc_weekly_return = (Bitcoin_Price/lag(Bitcoin_Price, 7))-1) %>% 
  mutate(btc_weekly_change = (Bitcoin_Price - lag(Bitcoin_Price, 7))-1)

crypto_view <- crypto %>% 
  arrange(desc(btc_weekly_return)) %>% 
  select(Date, btc_weekly_return, btc_weekly_change, Bitcoin_Price)
  
crypto_view
```

```{r}

#Calculate the return, daily return.

crypto %>% ggplot() +
  geom_line(aes(x=Date, y=btc_weekly_return))
```

```{r}
covid_crash <- crypto %>% 
  filter(Date >= "2020-02-15" & Date <= "2020-03-30") 

bull_run <- crypto %>% 
  filter(Date >= "2021-01-01" & Date <= "2021-11-30")

# Summary stats
summary(covid_crash$Bitcoin_Price)
summary(bull_run$Bitcoin_Price)
```

```{r}
vwap_week <- crypto %>%
  group_by(week = floor_date(Date, "week")) %>%
  summarise(
    VWAP = sum(Bitcoin_Price * Bitcoin_Vol., na.rm = TRUE) / sum(Bitcoin_Vol., na.rm = TRUE)
  )

view(vwap_week)
```

```{r}
```

```{r}
monthly_counts <- crypto %>%
  mutate(Year = year(Date),
         Month = month(Date, label = TRUE)) %>%
  group_by(Year, Month, Bit_Classification) %>%
  summarise(Count = n(), .groups = 'drop')

ggplot(monthly_counts, aes(x = Month, y = Count, fill = Bit_Classification)) +
  geom_col(position = "dodge") +
  facet_wrap(~Year) +
  labs(title = "Monthly High/Low Classifications by Year",
       y = "Count", x = "Month") +
  theme_minimal()
```

```{r}
view(crypto)
```

```{r}

#Work on some analysis with VWAP, Correlation with trading volumes, crypto prices, and tech stocks.
#1-2 Advanced graphs
#Linear Regression
#Logistic Regression, Multiple Regression
#Decision Tree



#Correlation with trading volumes and prices, aswell as other graphs, get coefficients for all and determine significance

cor.test(crypto$Bitcoin_Price, crypto$Bitcoin_Vol.)
cor.test(crypto$Bitcoin_Price, crypto$Ethereum_Price)
cor.test(crypto$Ethereum_Price, crypto$Ethereum_Vol.)
cor.test(crypto$Bitcoin_Vol., crypto$Ethereum_Vol.)

```

```{r}
#Simple linear regression
lin_model <- lm(Bitcoin_Price ~ Bitcoin_Vol. + Ethereum_Price, data = crypto)

# Summary
summary(lin_model)
```

```{r}
#Simple linear regression
lin_model <- lm(Bitcoin_Price ~ Ethereum_Price, data = crypto)

# Summary
summary(lin_model)
```

```{r}
ggplot(crypto, aes(x = Ethereum_Price, y = Bitcoin_Price)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.5) +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = TRUE, color = "blue") +
  labs(title = "Bitcoin Price vs Ethereum Price with Regression Line",
       x = "Ethereum Price",
       y = "Bitcoin Price")
```

```{r}
#classify between High, med/low

# Collapse into Binary: High = 1, Medium/Low = 0
crypto$Bit_Class_Binary <- ifelse(crypto$Bit_Classification == "High", 1, 0)
# Multiple logistic regression
multi_logit_model <- glm(Bit_Class_Binary ~ Bitcoin_Vol. + Ethereum_Price + Ethereum_Vol. + btc_weekly_return, 
                         data = crypto, family = binomial)

# Summary
summary(multi_logit_model)

```

```{r}
# Remove rows with any NA values in relevant columns
crypto_clean <- crypto %>%
  filter(!is.na(Bitcoin_Vol.), !is.na(Ethereum_Price),
         !is.na(Ethereum_Vol.), !is.na(btc_weekly_return))

# Now re-fit the model on crypto_clean
multi_logit_model <- glm(Bit_Class_Binary ~ Bitcoin_Vol. + Ethereum_Price + Ethereum_Vol. + btc_weekly_return,
                         family = binomial, data = crypto_clean)

# Predict on the cleaned dataset
crypto_clean$multi_predicted_prob <- predict(multi_logit_model, type = "response")

# Create a binary prediction
crypto_clean$multi_predicted_class <- ifelse(crypto_clean$multi_predicted_prob > 0.5, 1, 0)

# Confusion matrix
table(Actual = crypto_clean$Bit_Class_Binary, Predicted = crypto_clean$multi_predicted_class)
```

```{r}
install.packages("nnet")
library(nnet)
```

```{r}
view(crypto)
```

```{r}
# Multinomial Logistic Regression
crypto$Bit_Classification <- as.factor(crypto$Bit_Classification)

multi_class_model <- multinom(Bit_Classification ~ Bitcoin_Vol. + Ethereum_Price + Ethereum_Vol. + btc_weekly_return,
                              data = crypto)

summary(multi_class_model)
```

```{r}
write.csv(crypto,"crypto.csv") 
```
